heading: Definitions
label: 15102 Definitions
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10102 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10102 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.heading: .—Board
children.label: 1 .—Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Surface Transportation Board.

children.heading: .—Pipeline carrier
children.label: 2 .—Pipeline carrier
children.text: The term “pipeline carrier” means a person providing pipeline transportation for compensation.

children.heading: .—Rate
children.label: 3 .—Rate
children.text: The term “rate” means a rate or charge for transportation.

children.heading: .—State
children.label: 4 .—State
children.text: The term “State” means a State of the United States and the District of Columbia.

children.label: A
children.text: property, facilities, instrumentalities, or equipment of any kind related to the movement of property, regardless of ownership or an agreement concerning use; and

children.label: B
children.text: services related to that movement, including receipt, delivery, transfer in transit, storage, handling, and interchange of property.

children.heading: .—United states
children.label: 6 .—United states
children.text: The term “United States” means the States of the United States and the District of Columbia.
